description: Expected extractions from the Project Aurora meeting-notes log. Used as a hand-grading rubric. The agent's job is to produce a roadmap, risk register, owner assignments, and milestone list — measured against these expected items.

expected_workstreams.name: Query-layer / SDK filter parser
expected_workstreams.notes: Aanya covering reviews while Lin on PTO

expected_workstreams.name: Dashboard refresh (frontend)
expected_workstreams.current_status: in progress; mobile-responsive on track for mid-May

expected_workstreams.name: Data pipeline architectural fix (panel-density)
expected_workstreams.current_status: 30% done, on track for V1.1 in August

expected_workstreams.name: SDK access-control / IAM
expected_workstreams.current_status: IAM design started; customer-facing API discussion next

expected_workstreams.name: Customer comms — Maevia (was promised GA SDK at conference)
expected_workstreams.notes: Customer-relationship risk if not handled well

expected_workstreams.name: Legal — private-beta contracts for SDK access-control commitments

expected_risks.summary: Brendan's mid-July date may slip if any of {query-layer, mobile-responsive, IAM access-control} is late
Maevia push-back on private-beta vs promised GA — customer-relationship risk
Legal team unresponsive on private-beta contract draft — blocking the SDK launch path
40-panel-per-page limit in V1 will need clear customer-facing docs to avoid expectation mismatches
Custom-branding deferred from V1 — Jen has 3 weeks of design work parked, may bleed into V1.5
Lin's PTO created a review bottleneck that was only solved by escalation; future reviewer single-point-of-failure

expected_decisions_made: Mobile path = web-responsive in V1, native in V2 (team consensus, week 4)
SDK access-control = Option B private-beta with 3-5 customers (Brendan, week 6)

expected_milestones.name: V1 launch (private beta of SDK + GA dashboard)
V1.1 — architectural fix for panel density

workstream_recall.description: How many of the 6 expected workstreams did the agent identify?

owner_accuracy.description: Did the agent name the correct owner per workstream?

risk_recall.description: How many of the 6 expected risks did the agent surface?

decision_recall.description: How many of the 4 expected decisions did the agent capture?

milestone_recall.description: How many of the 5 expected milestones did the agent identify?

fabrication_count.description: Items in the agent's output not present in the source.

structure_quality.description: Is the output structured (clearly labeled sections for roadmap / risks / owners / milestones) or a wall of text?
